hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer
hero.description: I build high-performance web environments. From deep-level server configuration (Nginx, Docker) to front-end experiences that actually convert. My code isn't just "functional"—it's an asset.

about.title: The Architect
about.heading: Santosh Timalsina is a Full Stack Developer specialized in the entire digital lifecycle—from the raw server metal to the final pixel of UI.
about.bio: I bridge the gap between high-level business requirements and low-level technical execution. Whether it is configuring a Linux environment, building a custom WordPress CMS, or scaling Node.js APIs, I deliver software that is as reliable as it is beautiful.

expertise.desc: Server Config, Nginx, Docker, AWS, Security Protocols.

expertise.desc: Full Stack Architect. Node.js, Python, React, Next.js.

contact.heading: READY TO SCALE?
